title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
notes:
Features a shortened tracklist compared to the digital release, as well as "Society" and "Runaway," two bonus tracks exclusive to first pressing copies.

"VINYL MADE IN MEXICO" printed on rear shrink wrap.
